title: oreophylax bellidifolius
intro: Oreophylax bellidifolius, also known as the Alpine St John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Oreophylax bellidifolius is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
